summary: The user recently judged a film festival at their university, awarding a tie for first place in the fiction category. They expressed interest in film recommendations, particularly dramas and documentaries, and discussed their appreciation for storytelling and character development in films, highlighting the semi-autobiographical nature of some works.
facts: The user judged a film festival at their university where students showcased their own short films and documentaries. The user awarded a tie for first place in the fiction category at the film festival. The user found the semi-autobiographical film that won the tie for first place to be powerful due to its honesty and vulnerability. The user has been enjoying dramas and documentaries lately. The user prefers feature films but is open to watching short films or documentaries. The user has a few hours free this weekend to watch films or series. The user appreciates storytelling and character development as the most important aspects of a film. The user is interested in films that explore themes of family and identity. The user has not previously judged a film festival before this experience. The user was impressed by the quality of the films and the creativity of the students at the festival.
